title: Fox & Mandal, VERTICES PARTNERS, Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas act on Gnani.AI Series B fundraise
description: Gnani Innovations Private Limited, dba Gnani.AI, has raised $10 million (₹94 crore) from a Series B fundraise led by Aavishkar Capital and existing investor InfoEdge Ventures.Fox & Mandal advised Gnani.AI on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Neytra Nayak (Associate Partner) and Kishan Jaiswal (Associate).VERTICES PARTNERS advised lead investor Aavishkar Capital on this fundraise.The transaction was led by Vinayak Burman (Founder and Managing Partner) and Vikrant Anand (Partner
